case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. REY NUILA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR
